nameMeanings.name: Handlo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Hanley  .

variants.name: Hanley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conor, Declan, Donovan, Eamonn, John Patrick.

Irish: shortened form of O'Hanley, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁinle ‘descendant of Áinle’, a personal name meaning ‘champion’. This is the name of a former ruling family in Connacht and is now common throughout southern Ireland.

English: habitational name from any of the many places called Handley (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Dorset, Northamptonshire) or Hanley (Staffordshire, Worcestershire), named with Old English hēan, the weak dative form (originally used after a preposition and article) of hēah ‘high’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: Cecily Handlo was born about 1234, in Tonbridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Sir Nicholas de Haudlo. She died in Hadlow, Kent, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Handloは約1234年にイギリスイギリスケントトンブリッジで生まれた。彼女はSir Nicholas de Haudloとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスケントハドロウで死去し，イギリスイギリスケントハドロウスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary's Church, Hadlow, Tonbridge a: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 하들로 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Handlo(은)는 대략 1234년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 토브리지에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Nicholas de Haudlo(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 하들로에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 하들로 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.
